allow: Bash(node -e "const { createCanvas } = require\('@napi-rs/canvas'\); const c = createCanvas\(100,100\); const ctx = c.getContext\('2d'\); ctx.fillStyle='#FF0000'; ctx.fillRect\(0,0,100,100\); const buf = c.toBuffer\('image/jpeg',90\); console.log\('canvas OK, buffer size:', buf.length\)")
